deposit_type_code.text: ประเภทเงินฝาก

root.sql: SELECT sc_dep_m_creditor.deposit_account_no, sc_dep_m_creditor.deposit_opened_date, sc_dep_m_creditor.deposit_account_name, sc_dep_m_creditor.deposit_balance, sc_dep_m_rule.deposit_name, sc_dep_m_creditor.address, sc_dep_m_creditor.loan_holding_amount, sc_dep_m_creditor.accumulate_interest, sc_dep_m_creditor.close_status, sc_dep_m_creditor.last_calcint_date, sc_dep_m_creditor.officer_id FROM sc_dep_m_creditor, sc_dep_m_rule WHERE ( sc_dep_m_creditor.deposit_type_code = sc_dep_m_rule.deposit_type_code ) /*WHERE*/
